afterUseText: K Kitchen PERMIT 1 PHOTOS & NOTES 2 REVIEW REPORT Blocked / no access 3 OUTPUTS MENU COMPANY VERSION COMPANY ACCESS ACTIVE Company mode: Summit Fire Hood Cleaning details are applied. Reports save to history and customer links/PDFs stay available after creation. (512) 555-0148 / service@summithood.test FREE COMPANY OPEN ACCOUNT REVIEW REPORT Review the service report. Read it like the customer will. Change only wrong statuses; every output updates together. OPEN OUTPUTS CONFIRM RESULT Result is set. Change only if the visit outcome is wrong. CHANGED BY YOU COMPLETED Completed RECOMMENDED BLOCKED / NO ACCESS Completed where reachable SELECTED CONDITION FOUND Service done, condition noted Current result: You changed the suggested answer. The report now follows your selected result. OPTIONAL NOTE Leave blank to keep the default record wording. 164/220 ADVANCED DETAILS CUSTOMER-STYLE REPORT PREVIEW Ready to generate Edit the status chips inside this preview. Service report link, PDF, follow-up, revisit, and next-service copy all use the same record. 0 PHOTO AREAS 4 NOTES-ONLY AREAS STANDARD CONFIRMED CUSTOMER-READY COPY Completed: Hood canopy and filters, Reachable plenum, duct path, and access, Rooftop fan and roof discharge, Grease path and containment. No blocked, incomplete, or separate area is shown as completed. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied. Move the stored equipment or obstruction away from the access point, then reply so a revisit can be scheduled.
